utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides both (physical_health, mental_health) and a total_health_cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides home_contents with coverage details and a cost, plus a total_property_cost. Fully specified (the extra additional_services inside this section does not detract).
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides comprehensive_travel and total_travel_cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists concierge_services and wellness_programs with cost indication (included/no additional cost) and gives total_additional_cost (€0/month). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_cost and annual_cost; also includes extra fields (savings, implementation, transition), which is acceptable. Fully specified.
Thus, 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each named item from the final coverage plan to the exact matching option in the ground-truth ratings: Physical health 'ConsultingPro Partner Benefits Package' does not exist in the ratings, so it cannot be mapped. Mental health 'Emergency Mental Health Care supplement' aligns with 'Emergency Mental Health Care' in Health Enhancement Services. Property 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' matches exactly under property_protection.home_content. Additional property service 'Entertainment System Discount' matches in property_enhancement_services. Travel 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' matches exactly under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. Concierge services and wellness programs 'Included in ConsultingPro Partner Benefits Package' have no direct rating entries as-is, so not mapped.
